_TODO: Replace these placeholder testimonials with real ones from early newsletter subscribers and beta users before launch. Each entry: name (first name + last initial), city/country, quote (1-2 sentences), tier (which Pass they have).

items.name: Carlos M.
items.quote: The team dossiers are the only World Cup content I read that doesn't feel like a press release. Bought Tournament Pass on day one.

items.name: Aisha K.
items.quote: Finally a prediction site that explains its own model instead of asking me to trust it. The morale weighting alone changed how I think about Mexico vs. Argentina.

items.name: Daniela R.
items.quote: I used the host-city travel guides to plan four match-day trips. The Guadalajara breakdown saved my friend's bachelor party.

items.name: Mateo F.
items.quote: Cancelled my Athletic subscription. KickOracle has the same editorial voice plus the data I actually use.

items.name: Ben T.
items.quote: Our fantasy podcast pulled three weeks of segments straight from the chemistry index. Easy refer to.

items.name: Yuki S.
items.quote: Reading in Japanese, the dossier voice survives translation. That's rare.

items.name: Olivia P.
items.quote: Bought the Mexico Team Pass for my dad's birthday. He sends me screenshots every match day. Thanks.

items.name: Marcus B.
items.quote: Seven match passes in. The 48-hour window forces me to actually read the analysis instead of skimming.
